item.title: Memory Lane – In July 2015, President Barack Obama announced the Iran Nuclear Deal (JCPOA).
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Dumpscilla: Queen of the Desert
item.description:
Looking for more terms like this
Bloodthirsty bastards!
Turn on the red alert so we can chase the dot
That’s why I gave up, it’s too risky to be important. People might ask you to do more things
Been to a few of these, they sink into memory like a discarded tool into the muck
Keep dancing to it and it’ll make sense eventually
The idyllic world they stole from us
I did not mean to put these together to imply any sense of otherness. I try to share precolonial spaces to remind us of the options for community. I shudder to think that in the cruel pursuit of resources we have erased wisdoms and voices. Not to say any society was without deep flaws, which we should also learn from. Anyway, just daydreaming about the shapes of societies.
And other shapes
Right… I’m awake airman. No, no water bottle, just dry electrolyte packets. Just think of it as a pixie stick.
Salt their fields!
Is there a version where it’s not all melancholic sorrow?
Perfect.
We must imagine Sisyphus happy, because it’s either that or realize we are morally obligated to build a catapult for the boulder and launch it at Zeus. Or maybe a trebuchet, this is why I can’t do this alone, im not an engineer
I’m this thing, just a sheet thrown over some disillusioned stage hand, trying not to show my tennis shoes
My alarms bouncing off me sleeping
Plod along with me
It’s deliberate
Rewilding is a neat concept
I bet he smokes reds
They let me in no problem. Just use my library card.
I have an old cat picture like this. Maybe it’ll make the tax one day.
Important artifacts
Dani Moonstar is awesome
Kinda what work feels like
We’ve done this all before
Cities come and go
As man reshapes the world
Here’s the thing
It can also be a dump terminating image
Before taxes, of course
item.dc:creator: vagrantvigilantepunk

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: My wife pushed me to try something new
item.description: I was really making a mountain out of a molehill, just like when I got into wearing leggings, which are now my default. My wife wanted both of us to go out in cute dresses, but I got into the mental loop of I want to but I'm scared to but I want to. We ended up going ro the car and I wasn't wearing a dress, but I broke down crying and my wife convinced me to come back upstairs and get changed. One private private breakdown and a complete reapplication of makeup, and i came back down smiling and feeling fine! Edit: Thanks for all the kind words everyone, especially those of you praising my wife. ❤️ I went out clothes shopping with her a little after posting, still in the dress and a full face of makeup that time and felt more confident in my femininity than ever. Unfortunately, I found exactly 0 articles of clothing I liked, which put a huge damper on my mood until a girl at a thrift store complimented both our dresses and asked us for an opinion on a dress she had picked out. The molehill has been conquered for now, but I'll take another stab at it soon! My dress did not have pockets but I have a big purse for a reason ?
item.dc:creator: MacroMoray

item.title: Phone clearing meme dumpy
item.description:
Some kid every class
Google I'm three feet from the other device!!
Go on and do it, no one will know
Always have to share this with my ELA coworkers
Ain't it the truth
Every damn observation
Lol a class with only one like this
Again, someone every class
The math ain't mathing
Look at this photograph
Even with premade groups
Applies to DnD and teaching lol
It's that time of year again!
Greek lit post for my ELA homies again
Memes that I wish I could send home with grades
The caucasity of some people is astounding
I was told it did not have this in my notes when teaching bio
Again a teaching and d&d one, as I stare at my selves of text book
Adapt description of the kid that just exists in group projects as well
This one's just here because I think it's neat
* nervously stares at the top drawer of my work desk*
This speaks to my soul
Hey math is math
For the history/social studies homies
Every poster on here forever
What a tweeest
Those messages are such a joy to send......
I'm aware this would make sense as the last one in the dump, but I'm not scrolling back up to fix it
Deep
For all my art homies
item.dc:creator: pokedude3

item.dc:creator: McPuffinStuff

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1696 (bromze-age Sunday)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. [EDIT: I dislike that even still, years into imgur, one cannot edit typos in a title. Ugh.]
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [Kissing noises] "thank you! I love you. Thank you. Okay." _____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin

item.title: Leigh McGowan (@iampoliticsgirl): "This government is putting us in so much danger"
item.description: I've been wondering why one of Trump's favorite deportation destinations was the Congo. Also wondering about those flights and DHS-ICE/military types that made them. They have been temporarily paused as of May 21, 2026 (supposedly), probably nothing to worry about, but if it was anyone else they'd be denied entry for 30 days.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: GovBrief Today #478
item.description: The Justice Department spent Memorial Day weekend deleting the record of who attacked the Capitol. Press releases announcing the charges against Jan. 6 rioters disappeared from DOJ's website. After a Washington Post reporter noticed, DOJ replied on X: "Nothing quiet about it. We are proud," calling the deleted record "partisan propaganda." Police officers, led by the U.S. Capitol Police, defended the Vice President and Congress on January 6. DOJ brought more than a thousand cases against the rioters who attacked them, then erased its own record of that work on the weekend Americans remember the people who died defending the country. I've emailed 7,541 stories over 478 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data: https://go.govbrief.today/260523-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may23 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/calif-chemical [3] https://go.govbrief.today/jan6-censored [4] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-gunshots [5] https://go.govbrief.today/sf-immigration [6] https://go.govbrief.today/loudon-titleix Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: It be like that
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44

item.title: Fluidized Bed Coating
item.description: Fluidized bed coating is a highly efficient process where parts or particles are immersed into a suspended bed of powder that acts like a liquid. It is widely used in manufacturing for applying durable plastic coatings to metals and for micro-encapsulating powders in the pharmaceutical and food industries. For industrial metal fabrication, this method applies thick, protective, thermoplastic or epoxy layers to complex shapes. Preheating: Metal parts are heated in an oven to a specific temperature that exceeds the melting point of the coating powder. Fluidization: Compressed air is pushed through a porous membrane at the bottom of a hopper containing the polymer powder (like nylon, PVC, or epoxy). This air suspends the powder, making it behave and flow like a liquid. Dipping & Fusing: The hot part is immersed in the fluidized bed. The powder instantly melts on contact and fuses into a uniform, thick, corrosion-resistant shell.
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
Happy Sunday everyone, we're all excited for TheFreePizzaDude post today! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been an amazing help in feeding more people, we love you so much! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 6pm central
The Pucketts are here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 1st by Pizza Angel @NeelyAdkins 2nd, 3rd, 4th and 5th by @OP 6th, 7th and 8th by Pizza Angel @jennytornado 9th, 10th, 11th and 12th by @OP 13th, 14th and 15th by Pizza Angel @jennytornado 16th, 17th and 18th by Pizza Angel @NoRoutesFound 19th and 20th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 21st by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 22nd, Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant, 25th and 26th by Pizza Angel @irvingschwinglepuck 27th, 28yh, 29th and 30th by @OP 31st, 32nd and 33rd by Pizza Angel @Jennytornado 34th and 35th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen ... Today's Grocery Tally 1st by Grocery Angel @NeelyAdkins
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude
